provisions.title: AMENDING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 180
provisions.content:
-385-

      MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DOMINGO.
                     Executiv? Orc‘,er N3. 740.
          AMENDING EXECUTIVE GRDEB No. 180.

    By virtue of the powers v.este:l in the Xilitary Govei-nment
of Santo Domingo, the folloa.ing Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
     ARTICLE 1. Executive Order No. 180 is hercby amended
to read as follows :
     “Article 1. The sale, in the Dominican Republic, of intox-
icants, with the exception of beers and light wines, t o members
of the M:’litai-y Forces of the United States, in uniform, is hereby
prohibited.
     “Article 2. The sale, in the Dominican Republic, of intox-
incants, in any form, t o members of the Military Forces of the
Unlited States, in uniform, when under the influelnce of intox-
icants, is hereby prohibited.
     “Article 3. The Provost Courts of the Mi’litary Govern-
ment shall have exclusive jurisdiction t o hersr a11 cases of infrac-
tion of this Law, and to inflict punishments therefor.”
     ARTICLE 2. All laws or parts of ‘laws in concict herewith
are hereby re pealed.

                                      S. S. ROEISON,
                          Rear Admiral, United Stite., Navy,
                         MiMary Governor of dsnt3 Do,?;lngc.
Santo Domingo, 3 . D.,
May 5, 1922.

     MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DOMINGO.
